name_cn:
♣️DiorTravel Backpack "Small Blue Cloth"
This DiorTravel backpack cleverly blends Dior's classic details with a fashionable and practical design. Crafted from blue jacquard technical fabric, it is fully adorned with Oblique print and features a prominent Christian Dior Paris logo on the front. The spacious main compartment has a zipper for easy access to various daily essentials. It comes with a handle and shoulder straps, allowing it to be worn on the shoulder or as a backpack.
Christian Dior Paris logo on the front
Adjustable straps
Front zip pocket
Model: 096
Dimensions: 23.5 x 32 x 11 cm (L x H x W)
